materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose…

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook
rounds.title: Foundation

rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc the the last st ( 24)

rounds.summary: Third round worked in front loops only.
Work single crochet around for four rounds.

rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Finish off and weave in ends.
rounds.title: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11 and do the same with bottom case but R3 do not FLO.
rounds.summary: Foundation and first rounds, but round 3 is not in front loops only.
rounds.title: Foundation and repeats

rounds.summary: Work single crochet around for three rounds.
rounds.title: R5-7

rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.
rounds.summary: Prepare to join the top and bottom cases.
rounds.title: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more

rounds.rawInstruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Join the top and bottom cases with slip stitches.
rounds.title: To connect 2 shells

rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR,do not join, just tie MR
rounds.summary: Create ear in a magic ring.
rounds.title: Ears

rounds.summary: Work single crochet for two rounds.

rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.title: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
